title: Expression and purification protocol of FIP200 full length or FIP200∆641–779
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9i0lf","text":"This protocol describes the expression and purification of FIP200 full length or FIP200∆641–779.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":87,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"efkf5","text":"General information: expression system: human embryonic kidney (HEK) 293 GnTI suspension cells, medium: freestyle media + Anti-Anti; plasmid origin: Addgene 171410 or 17141; backbone: pCAG; resistance: Amp; insert: Homo sapiens FIP200 (synthetic gene); tags \u0026 cleavage sites: GST-TEVcs-FIP200-MBP, Ext coeff: 183470 M-1cm-1, MW 252 kDa","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":21},{"style":"italic","offset":215,"length":13},{"style":"sup","offset":317,"length":2},{"style":"sup","offset":321,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"fu4nl","text":"For hazard information and safety warnings, please refer to the SDS (Safety Data Sheet).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"fngq2","text":"Lysis Buffer: 50 mM Hepes pH=7.4; 1% Triton X-100, 200 mM NaCl, 1 mM MgCl2, 10% Glycerol, 1 mM TCEP, EDTA-free Protease Inhibitors (Roche).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":14},{"style":"sub","offset":73,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7e7io","text":"Wash Buffer 1: 50 mM Hepes pH=7.4, 500 mM NaCl, 1 mM MgCl2,1 mM TCEP, 1% Triton X-100, 10% Glycerol;","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":15},{"style":"sub","offset":57,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9uu5m","text":"Wash Buffer 2: 20 mM Hepes pH=8, 200 mM NaCl, 1 mM MgCl2,1 mM TCEP;","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":15},{"style":"sub","offset":55,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"972mf","text":"Elution Buffer 1: 50 mM Hepes pH=7.4, 500 mM NaCl, 1 mM MgCl2, 1 mM TCEP, 1% Triton X-100, 10% Glycerol, 50 mM Glutathione;","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18},{"style":"sub","offset":60,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"an6pi","text":"Elution Buffer 2: 20 mM Hepes pH=8, 200 mM NaCl, 1 mM MgCl2, 1 mM TCEP, 50 mM Maltose;","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18},{"style":"sub","offset":58,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"50fmf","text":"Resin: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6sshs","text":"Glutathione Sepharose 4B (GE Healthcare)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5mhim","text":"Amylose resin (New England Biolabs).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Transfect DNA in cells at a concentration of 2.5–3×10 6 /mL using polyethylenimine (Polysciences) and harvest after 48:00:00 expression, harvest and lyse cells with lysis buffer.

Glutathione Sepharose 4B (GE Healthcare) followed by MBP-tag affinity purifications. Incubate supernatant (added 6M NaCl to a final concentration of 0.5 M) with Glutathione Sepharose 4B resin at 4 °C with gentle shaking for 10:00:00 , apply to a gravity flow column, and wash extensively with Wash Buffer 1.
Pellet the harvested cells at 500 x g, °C, for 00:10:00 at 4 °C , wash with PBS once, and then store at -80 °C .
Resuspend the cell pellet in Lysis Buffer, gentlely shake at 4 °C for 00:30:00 and clear it at 16.000 rpm, °C, at 4 °C for 00:30:00 .

Elute protein of interest with Elution Buffer 1 and then further apply onto Amylose resin for a second step of affinity purification. Wash Amylose resin with Wash Buffer 2, and elute Protein of interest with Elution Buffer 2.
Pool peak fractions containing pure protein, concentrate, snap-freeze in liquid nitrogen and store at -80 °C . Yield: about 0.2 mg per litter culture
creator: Xiaoshan Shi
